creator: amistry@am-productions.biz
text:
I was about to say, have you checked the bug tracker, but the 
bugs.avidemux.org DNS record is messed up thus not showing the bug 
tracker correctly.  I've contacted mean and he should be able to fix 
the DNS record for the bug tracker.  Once that's up check the bug 
tracker and post to the forum (http://avidemux.org/admForum).

Thanks,
-- 
Anish Mistry
amistry@am-productions.biz
AM Productions http://am-productions.biz/
